name: Portainer-Agent
description: Portainer Agent is a lightweight component that runs on remote Docker hosts to allow Portainer to manage them securely. It provides a secure tunnel between your Portainer instance and remote Docker environments without exposing the Docker socket directly.

paths.name: Docker Socket
paths.description: Docker socket for remote container management. Required for the agent to function.

paths.name: Docker Volumes
paths.description: Docker volumes directory for managing volumes remotely.

paths.name: Host Root
paths.description: Host root filesystem mounted as read-only. Used for volume browsing and management.

ports.name: Agent
ports.description: Portainer Agent communication port. Portainer connects to this port to manage the remote Docker host.

variables.name: Agent Secret
variables.description: Optional: Shared secret for agent authentication. Must match the secret configured in Portainer when adding this environment.
